mentions.note: Discretionary retailer selling 100% discretionary goods getting absolutely slaughtered; war and consumer weakness fears driving panic.
One of strongest stocks this year; like it very much and would buy ahead of Wednesday quarter given consistency and pricing power.
Discretionary bargain retailer lost luster; remained cautious on macro and consumer sentiment. No raise to guidance, stock down 14%. Days of bargain stores as recession play are over.
Eccentric specialty retailer uniting economic groups; caters to families avoiding high prices; Cramer blessing to buy.
Spectacular turnaround under CEO Winnie Park; beat guidance on SSS growth (15.4% vs 14.5%), EPS ($4.31 vs $4.00), and full-year guidance; stock tripled in 12 months with more room to run.
